email_subscription_desc: Receive promotional emails including events, discounts, and marketing updates.
marketing_consent_desc: Agree to the collection and use of personal information for marketing purposes.
third_party_consent_desc: Agree to the sharing of personal information with third parties for marketing purposes.
info_disclosure_desc: Allow your profile information to be visible to other users.
info_disclosure_warning: Some community features may be limited if not agreed.
no_terms_content: Terms content has not been registered.

settings.title: Marketing Consent Settings
settings.description: Manage marketing consent items and terms pages.

marketing_consent_enabled.label: Enable Marketing Consent
marketing_consent_enabled.hint: When disabled, the marketing consent item is hidden from all screens.

marketing_consent_terms_slug.label: Marketing Consent Terms Page Slug
marketing_consent_terms_slug.hint: Enter the SLUG of the terms page managed by the Page module. Leave empty to hide the view terms button.

third_party_consent_enabled.label: Enable Third Party Consent
third_party_consent_enabled.hint: When disabled, the third party consent item is hidden.

third_party_consent_terms_slug.label: Third Party Consent Terms Page Slug
third_party_consent_terms_slug.hint: Enter the SLUG of the terms page managed by the Page module.

info_disclosure_enabled.label: Enable Information Disclosure Consent
info_disclosure_enabled.hint: When disabled, the information disclosure consent item is hidden.

info_disclosure_terms_slug.label: Information Disclosure Terms Page Slug
info_disclosure_terms_slug.hint: Enter the SLUG of the terms page managed by the Page module.

channels.description: Manage marketing consent channels. Each channel is an independent consent item that members can opt in or out of individually during registration and in their profile settings.

channel_modal.title: Add / Edit Channel
channel_modal.key_hint: Only lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores (_) are allowed.
channel_modal.page_slug_hint: Leave empty to hide the view terms button.

channel_deactivate_modal.title: Cannot Delete Channel
channel_deactivate_modal.message: This channel has existing consent records and cannot be deleted. Would you like to deactivate it instead?
